---
title: "test_base_warden.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_base_warden.py"
loc: 29
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.97
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.78
---

## Intent
The `test_base_warden.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on ConcreteWarden, scan, mock_warden, test_base_warden_load_config, test_base_warden_should_ignore, test_base_warden_scan_async, test_base_warden_propose_evolution. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via ConcreteWarden, scan, mock_warden, test_base_warden_load_config, test_base_warden_should_ignore, test_base_warden_scan_async, test_base_warden_propose_evolution. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)

### Exports
- `ConcreteWarden`
- `scan`
- `mock_warden`
- `test_base_warden_load_config`
- `test_base_warden_should_ignore`
- `test_base_warden_scan_async`
- `test_base_warden_propose_evolution`
